feature_register_checkout_desc: Bixin degdeg ah oo leh baaritaan barcode ama raadin gacanta ah. Lacag-bixin la kala qaybiyo, deymo, qiimo-dhimis, celin lacag, iyo rasiidyo dijitaal ah lacag kasta.
feature_multi_currency_desc: Deji lacagta dukaankaaga GBP, USD, EUR, NGN, KES, AED, INR, ZAR ama 150+ kuwa kale. Heerarka sarrifka, qaabaynta calaamadaha, iyo xeerarka tobanleyda si otomaatig ah ayaa loo maamulaa.
feature_inventory_desc: Heerarka kaydka oo wakhti-dhab ah oo laan kasta ku jira. Digniinaha kayd-yaraan, wareejinta kaydka, cusboonaysiin wadar ah, iyo talooyin dalab-dib-u-dalbasho oo AI ku shaqeeya.
feature_multi_branch_desc: Ka maamul goobo badan — dal isku mid ah ama kuwo xuduud ka gudba — daashboodh keliya. Lacag, canshuur, kayd, iyo dejin shaqaale laan kasta u gaar ah.
feature_staff_shifts_desc: Gelitaan ku salaysan door oo loogu talagalay keeshiyayaal iyo maareeyayaal. Fur/xir nawbado oo leh isku-fadhiid lacag, gelitaan OTP, iyo la socod waxqabadka keeshiye kasta.
feature_tax_compliance_desc: VAT, GST, canshuurta iibka, iyo heerarka canshuurta maxalliga ah ee gaarka ah. Xeerarka aag-badan, warbixinno isku-dhafan, iyo horudhac diyaar-gudbin ah. Wuxuu la isku xiraa Xero iyo QuickBooks.
feature_localisation_desc: Qaababka taariikhda, kala-soocayaasha tirooyinka, qaababka ciwaanka, iyo qaab-dhismeedka rasiidyada si otomaatig ah ayay ula jaanqaadaan dalkaaga. Waxaa ku jira taageero luqadaha midig-ilaa-bidix.
feature_payments_desc: Aqbal kaadh, lacag caddaan, lacagta mobiilka (EVC Plus, Zaad, Sahal, eDahab), QR bixin, iyo lacag-bixin la kala qaybiyo. Wuxuu shaqeeyaa iyada oo aan la xirin, wuxuuna isku xiraa marka dib loo xiro.
feature_ai_intelligence_desc: Ogaanshaha waxyaabaha aan caadiga ahayn ee macaamilada, talooyin alaab-qeybiye oo AI ku shaqeeya, aragti ku saabsan qaababka iibka, iyo saadaal baahi — dhammaan xogtaada POS.
feature_reports_desc: Warbixino iib maalinle, toddobaadle, iyo bille ah oo loo kala qaybiyay badeeco, keeshiye, laan, iyo hab lacag-bixin. Ku dhoofi lacagtaada gudaha.
feature_privacy_desc: Diyaar u ah GDPR, NDPR, POPIA, iyo PDPA. Hal-guji dhoofin xogta macmiilka, codsiyada tirtirka, diiwaangelinta oggolaanshaha, iyo xeerar-hayn la habayn karo.
feature_works_everywhere_desc: Wuxuu ka shaqeeyaa qalab kasta — iPad miiska hore, taleefan Android oo goobaha kooban, ama kombuyuutar xafiiska danbe. Qalab gaar ah llooma baahna, xir-xir ma jiro.
workflow_1_desc: Keeshiyaha wuxuu ku galaa OTP, wuxuu tirsadaa lacagta bilowga, kaash-rejisterkuna wuu firfircoon yahay.
workflow_2_desc: Baar barcodeyada ama raadi badeecooyinka. Kala qaybi lacag-bixinta, dabaqi qiimo-dhimis, sii rasiidyo dijitaal ah.
workflow_3_desc: Macaamil kastaa wuxuu quudiyaa lakabkaaga sirdoonka — digniinaha waxyaabaha aan caadiga ahayn, talooyinka dib-u-kaydinta, falanqaynta faa'iidada.
workflow_4_desc: Xir nawbada, isku-fadhiid lacagta, xogta maalintuna waxay u qulqushaa warbixinnadaada iyo isku-xirka xisaabaadka.
demo_step_1_desc: Kaamirada u tilmaam barcode ama koodh QR kasta. Wax lama qoro.
demo_step_2_desc: Badeecada waxaa lagu waafajiyaa kaydkaaga wax ka yar hal ilbiriqsi.
demo_step_3_desc: Xariiqda alaabtu waxay soo muuqataa oo leh qiime, tiro, iyo canshuur — si otomaatig ah.
demo_step_4_desc: Kaadh, lacag caddaan, ama boorso mobiil. Rasiidka waa la diraa si dijitaal ah.
hero_subtitle: Qori barcode ma jiro. Gelin gacan ma jirto. Kaliya taleefankaaga kaamirada u tilmaam badeeco kasta waxaana lagu daraa dambiisha — kaydka si degdeg ah ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyaa laan kasta.
hero_pricing_note: {price}/kursi bishii · POS buuxa ayaa ku jira · Qalab gaar ah looma baahna · Shopify looma baahno
demo_subtitle: Gelin gacan ma jirto. Tilmaam, baar, bixi — iibka oo dhan wuxuu qaataa ilbiriqsiyo.
demo_paid_badge: RASIIDKA WAA LA DIRAY · AI WAA LA CUSBOONAYSIIYAY
demo_no_signup: Is-diiwaangelin looma baahna — kaliya taabo ciyaar.
features_heading: Loo dhisay in lagu iibiyo meel kasta oo adduunka ah
features_subtitle: Hal madal. Dal kasta, lacag kasta, nidaam canshuur kasta. Dejin dheeraad ah ma jirto — kaliya dooro degaankaaga oo bilow iibinta.
features_global_desc: Hal mar deji lacagta dukaankaaga. Qiimayaasha, rasiidyada, warbixinnada canshuurta, iyo dhoofinta xisaabaadka dhammaan way raacaan. U beddel laamaha lacago kala duwan iyada oo aanad waxba lumin.
features_tax_title: Nidaam kasta oo canshuur weyn waa la taageeraa
features_tax_desc: VAT · GST · Canshuurta Iibka · Canshuurta Hakinta · Heerar gaar ah — loo habeeyay laan kasta, dal kasta.
sectors_heading: Loo habeeyay sida aad u shaqeyso
sectors_subtitle: Hal madal, lix qaybood. POS wuxuu la qabsadaa tiraabkiisa, hab-shaqeedkiisa, iyo sirdoonkiisa si ay ula jaanqaadaan nooca ganacsigaaga.
sectors_shared_note: Dhammaan qaybuhu waxay wadaagaan kayd, shaqaale, laamo, canshuur, AI, iyo lacag-badan.
compare_askbiz_1: Diiwaangeli iibka + digniin AI oo waxyaabaha aan caadiga ahayn
compare_askbiz_2: Kayd caqli leh oo AI dib-u-dalbasho leh
compare_askbiz_3: Warbixino otomaatig ah oo la isku xiray Xero / QB
compare_askbiz_4: Sirdoon ganacsi oo ku dhex jira
compare_askbiz_5: Aragti qaab AI oo iib kasta ka timaad
walkthrough_heading_line1: Ku dar keeshiye ama shaqaale kayd
walkthrough_subtitle: Koox IT ma jirto. Buugaag tababar ma jiraan. Dooro magac, deji door, wadaag OTP — shaqaalahaagu waa toos.
walkthrough_click_to_add: 👆 Guji si aad ugu darto shaqaale cusub
walkthrough_otp_note: Shaqaaluhu waxay ku galaan OTP hal-mar ah — furaha sir looma baahno. Waxaad xakameysaa cidda wax geli karta.
walkthrough_share_code: La wadaag koodhkan hal-mar ah xubintaada shaqaalaha
walkthrough_live_title: Amara way ku toosan tahay Rejister #2
walkthrough_live_desc: Waxay gashay 12 ilbiriqsi ka hor · Diyaar u ah inay lacag qaadato
walkthrough_progress_0: Guji ciyaar si aad u bilowdo
walkthrough_progress_3: Tallaabo 3 — OTP waa la soo saaray
walkthrough_fact_1_desc: Celceliska wakhtiga dejinta xubin shaqaale kasta
walkthrough_fact_2_desc: Furayaal sir ma jiraan — shaqaaluhu waxay helaan koodh hal-mar ah
walkthrough_fact_3_desc: Maareeye · Keeshiye · Kayd — hal mar deji, weligaa xakamee
pricing_subtitle: Ku dar POS qorshe kasta oo Koritaan ama Ganacsi ah.
pricing_desc: Kursi kastaa waa hal rejister ama qalab. Ku dar intaad u baahan tahay.
pricing_feature_3: Laamaha badan kharash dheeraad ah lama bixiyo
pricing_free_note: Qorshaha bilaashka ah had iyo jeer waa la heli karaa · Kaadh amaah looma baahna
cta_heading: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad si caqli badan u iibiso?
cta_subtitle: Deji rejisterkaaga koowaad wax ka yar 5 daqiiqo. Qalab looma baahna — kaliya gal oo bilow iibinta.
